title: mattiastrum subscaposum
intro: Mattiastrum subscaposum is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. It is commonly found in the southwestern United States, Mexico, and parts of Central America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Herbal preparations of Mattiastrum subscaposum may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms such as fever, pain, and inflammation.
